volatility: ProjectDesignPhaseWorkflow volatility — the sequence by which a project is driven through Phase 2 of The Method (planning assumptions → activity list → network draft → four solution options → risk modelling → SDP review → option-commitment gate), co-authored with the Architect User, validated, architect-gated, and committed.

ops.signature: requestArtifactDraft(projectId ProjectID, artifactKind ArtifactKind, feedback ReviewFeedback?) → SessionRef
ops.note: Starts or resumes a durable Phase-2 artifact co-authoring workflow; dispatches design job and suspends awaiting architect review signal.

fields.name: ProjectId
fields.note: uuid.UUID — the project aggregate identifier

fields.name: ArtifactKind
fields.note: Phase-2 kind (PlanningAssumptions|ActivityList|NetworkDraft|SdpReview…); non-Phase-2 kind is FailedPrecondition

fields.name: Feedback
fields.note: Optional; present on a redraft loop with architect rejection notes

fields.name: SessionRef
fields.note: Opaque infrastructure-opaque reference to the running Phase-2 co-authoring session

fields.name: (error)
fields.note: Method layer-typed error — ContractMisuse | FailedPrecondition | NotFound | Unauthorized | Infrastructure

ops.note: Starts the SDP-review workflow which assembles four options, runs the three estimation Engine joins, stages the SdpReview, and suspends awaiting the sdpDecision signal.

fields.name: SessionRef
fields.note: Opaque reference to the running SDP-review session

fields.name: (error)
fields.note: Method layer-typed error

ops.signature: submitSDPDecision(projectId ProjectID, decision SDPDecision, optionId OptionID?, feedback ReviewFeedback?) → void
ops.stereotype: Signal — SignalWorkflow to id {projectId}:sdpReview, signal sdpDecision
ops.note: Delivers the architect's Commit(optionId) or RejectAll(feedback) decision to the suspended SDP-review workflow.

fields.name: Decision
fields.note: SDPCommit | SDPRejectAll

fields.name: OptionId
fields.note: Required when Decision == SDPCommit; names one of the four assembled options

fields.name: Feedback
fields.note: Required when Decision == SDPRejectAll

fields.name: (void)
fields.note: Signal is async; returns once durably enqueued

fields.name: (error)
fields.note: Method layer-typed error — ContractMisuse (missing optionId/feedback) | NotFound (session not running) | Unauthorized | Infrastructure

ops.note: Seals Phase 2 by gating on committed SdpReview + bound option, then advancing the project phase; returns missing artifacts on failure.

fields.name: Advanced
fields.note: true iff Phase 2 sealed and project transitioned to ready for Phase 3

fields.name: MissingArtifacts
fields.note: Non-empty iff Advanced == false; which Phase-2 slots are not yet Committed

fields.name: (error)
fields.note: Method layer-typed error — FailedPrecondition | NotFound | Unauthorized | Infrastructure

ops.note: Returns a point-in-time read-only view of the running Phase-2 session's technical progress without mutating workflow state.

fields.name: ArtifactKind
fields.note: Optional; nil → the {projectId}:sdpReview session

fields.name: Stage
fields.note: StageDrafting | StageAssemblingSDP | StageAwaitingReview | StageRedrafting | StageCommitted | StageWithdrawn | StageDraftFailed

fields.name: Draft
fields.note: Staged typed draft or assembled SdpReview; nil before first stage

fields.name: Findings
fields.note: Latest validation findings; empty if none

fields.name: (error)
fields.note: Method layer-typed error — NotFound (session not running) | Unauthorized

dataContracts: SessionRef = opaque infrastructure-opaque reference to a running Phase-2 session
SessionStateView = { ProjectID; ArtifactKind; Stage SessionStage; Draft ArtifactModel; Findings []Finding }
SessionStage = StageDrafting | StageAssemblingSDP | StageAwaitingReview | StageRedrafting | StageCommitted | StageWithdrawn | StageDraftFailed
ProjectDesignError = framework-go/manager.Error { Kind: ContractMisuse | FailedPrecondition | NotFound | Unauthorized | Infrastructure }
errorModel: framework-go/manager.Error — kinds: ContractMisuse, FailedPrecondition, NotFound, Unauthorized, Infrastructure. FailedPrecondition (out-of-order/wrong-kind request) is distinct from a non-Advanced PhaseAdvanceResult (normal gating answer). Draft validation failures and worker refusals are handled inside the workflow, not surfaced as façade errors.
idempotency: Workflow entry ops are idempotent on the workflow id ({projectId}:{artifactKind} or {projectId}:sdpReview). Activities derive idempotencyKey = '${workflowId}:${activityId}' and pass it to projectStateAccess verbs. Dispatch jobs key on the same per-Activity idempotency key. Conflict on head-state mutations is handled by workflow-level re-read→re-apply.

revisions.summary: Initial contract designed as the Phase-2 twin of systemDesignManager. Five ops (Workflow×3, Signal×1, Query×1). Senior review approved and frozen with 9/9 PASS, 0 waivers. OQ-1..OQ-7 ruled by senior.

Phase-2 draft mechanism flipped from synchronous workerAccess.generateTypedData[T] to dispatch→observe→read-back via constructionPipelineAccess. workerAccess and artifactValidationEngine DROPPED from outbound set. constructionPipelineAccess added as new caller of FROZEN verbs. Three estimation Engines retained. StageDraftFailed added to SessionStage. Public five-op surface UNCHANGED.

PASS — FROZEN for construction. 0 blocking amendments. Sequence, idempotency-key collision-safety, failure/anti-wedge path, estimation Engines correctly retained, layering all verified. Two construction notes (N1/N2) inherited from the D-MSD-Δ twin.
